conflicts.reason: Install order dependency, not incompatibility. Rjali explicitly detects De'Arnise Romance via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches it for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH. Install Rjali AFTER De'Arnise Romance.
conflicts.myComps: #0 de'Arnise Romance for Baldur's Gate II
conflicts.source: Rjali multi.tpa has MOD_IS_INSTALLED check for deArnise, then patches its BCS/DLG files for multi-romance support. Designed to work together, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 292 vs 69)

sum: Adds a romance path for Nalia in BG2/ToB. Develops her noble idealism and personal growth through extensive dialogue.

co.n: de'Arnise Romance for Baldur's Gate II
co.tp2n: de'Arnise Romance for Baldur's Gate II

advisories.reason: Likely NOT a real conflict. Standard romance mods (including de'Arnise Romance) use RealSetGlobalTimer mechanics checked after PartyRested() in the main NPC script loop — independent of dream cutscene content. cdtweaks cn:3140/3141 (Faster Cutscenes) shorten dreams but preserve RestParty() calls. Romance timers fire based on game time, not during dream execution. Verified safe with Tashia and Solaufein using same timer pattern.
